title: BloodEffect
description: Adds blood-like particles when entities take damage.
body:
BloodEffect adds visual blood particles when entities take damage.


![Player_Damage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4dab81ea2ba8f990a53e24cf2fb15e2f685d15da.gif)


![Mod_Damage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d22c048606d653186b9a534ffb4375918335a1c6.gif)

Features:
- Block-style blood particles
- Blood follows entities
- Blood drops on the ground
- Lightweight and cosmetic
- No gameplay changes

Plugin version works on Paper(1.20.1-1.21.11).

Created by pc-g, Gemini & GPT
